TRANSCRIPT.INVITE: We invite you to experience the efficiency and accuracy of our cutting-edge speech-to-text technology by launching a task on your video content. With our advanced system, converting spoken words into accurate written text has never been easier. Seamlessly transcribe your videos, lectures, or interviews with precision and speed, ensuring that every word is captured and preserved. Experience the power of our speech-to-text tool today!

PANEL.INTRODUCTION:
As a valued member of our community we would like to invite you to be among the first to experience MXT, our new AI media indexing technology.

You’ll gain access to a powerful range of new features designed to help you overcome your current media indexing challenges and dramatically improve the searchability of your content.

Before proceeding, please note that since this is a Beta version processing time on larger videos may take longer than usual. We assure you that this is only temporary and we apologise for any inconvenience this may cause but we promise it's worth the wait!

Thanks again, we can’t wait to hear your feedback.
PANEL.ANALYSING: Analysis in progress. This may take some time depending on the length of your media.
PANEL.NO_ANALYSIS: This media file has not been analyzed by MXT and doesn’t contain any generated moments.
PANEL.BANNER_ACTIVE_MXT: Automated AI indexing with MXT is not yet enabled on this platform.

REPURPOSING.TITLE: Repurposing
REPURPOSING.DASHBOARD_TRENDING_HASHTAGS_EMPTY: No trending data. Set TWITTERAPI_IO_API_KEY on the server to enable.
REPURPOSING.DASHBOARD_TOP_USED_HASHTAGS_SUB: Hashtags that generated the most views on your publications
REPURPOSING.DASHBOARD_TOP_USED_HASHTAGS_EMPTY: No views data yet. Add hashtags to your distributions and get views to see them here.
REPURPOSING.PUBLICATIONS_EMPTY_HINT: Create a publication to distribute content to social platforms.
REPURPOSING.MEDIA_BY_FORMAT_HINT: Add at least one media per format to enable the matching platforms (e.g. 9:16 for Shorts, Reels, Stories).
REPURPOSING.MEDIA_DROP_ZONE_HINT: Drag files here or click to browse
REPURPOSING.DISTRIBUTIONS_EMPTY_HINT: Add a distribution to publish this publication to a platform.
REPURPOSING.NO_PROFILES: No Ayrshare profiles. Add one in settings.
REPURPOSING.GENERATE_CONTENT: Generate title, description and post text
REPURPOSING.PUBLISH_CONFIRM_TEXT: This will publish on all selected platforms. Continue?
REPURPOSING.SAVE_AND_PUBLISH_CONFIRM_TEXT: Save this publication and publish it immediately on all selected platforms?
REPURPOSING.PLATFORMS_BY_UPLOADED_FORMAT_HINT: Platforms below are enabled according to the media formats you uploaded (e.g. 9:16 for Shorts, Reels, Stories).
REPURPOSING.SELECT_PLATFORMS_HINT: Check the platforms you want this publication to be distributed to. Expand a row to set platform-specific options.
REPURPOSING.PLATFORM_OVERRIDE_POST_TEXT_HELP: Override the publication post text for this platform only. Leave empty to use the publication default.
REPURPOSING.PLATFORM_OVERRIDE_MEDIA_HELP: Override media for this platform only. Leave empty to use the publication default.
REPURPOSING.PLATFORM_OVERRIDE_SCHEDULED_HELP: Override schedule for this platform. Leave empty to use the publication default.
REPURPOSING.HASHTAGS_HELP: Use the field below to add hashtags specific to this platform. We recommend short, lowercase tags like #shorts or #reels.
REPURPOSING.HASHTAGS_MASTER_HINT: Default hashtags for all platforms. Override per platform in the right column if needed.
REPURPOSING.HASHTAGS_OVERRIDE_HINT: Leave empty to use master hashtags, or add platform-specific tags.
REPURPOSING.PLATFORM_OVERRIDE_USE_MASTER: Leave empty to use master post text

PUBLICATION_TYPES.INSTAGRAM_FEED_HELP: Feed post (images or videos, carousel up to 10).
PUBLICATION_TYPES.SNAPCHAT_STORY_HELP: Ephemeral story (24 hours, 9:16). One image or video per post.
PUBLICATION_TYPES.SNAPCHAT_SAVED_STORY_HELP: Permanent story on your public profile (9:16).
PUBLICATION_TYPES.SNAPCHAT_SPOTLIGHT_HELP: Permanent video on Spotlight for discoverability (9:16). Hashtags supported.

PLATFORM_OPTIONS.YOUTUBE_TITLE_HELP: Required for YouTube. The video title shown on the watch page. Max 100 characters.
PLATFORM_OPTIONS.YOUTUBE_DESCRIPTION_HELP: The description shown below the video. Can use the post text from above or override here.
PLATFORM_OPTIONS.YOUTUBE_VISIBILITY_HELP: Who can see the video: public (everyone), unlisted (anyone with the link), or private (only you).
PLATFORM_OPTIONS.TIKTOK_TITLE_HELP: Caption or title for the TikTok post.
PLATFORM_OPTIONS.TIKTOK_VISIBILITY_HELP: Who can see the post: public, private, followers only, or friends only.
PLATFORM_OPTIONS.TIKTOK_DISABLE_COMMENTS_HELP: When enabled, viewers cannot comment on the published post.
PLATFORM_OPTIONS.LINKEDIN_VISIBILITY_HELP: public (all LinkedIn users), connections (your 1st degree network), or loggedin (logged-in users only).
PLATFORM_OPTIONS.LINKEDIN_ALTTEXT_HELP: Alternative text for images for accessibility and screen readers.
